violations.text: A dish sponge was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Several ceiling tiles were observed missing over the dry storage shelving. PIC had stated that establishment was awaiting an inspection due to repairs that had been completed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
Dishes and a dish sponger were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Pasta, cheese, and deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Working containers of various sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the storage/prep area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Fly tape with deceased flies was observed hung over the dough preparation table. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC stated gaskets have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Several ceiling tiles in the dry storage area were missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated an inspection is needed on repairs done above ceiling line prior to replacement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

A dish sponge was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Sponge was removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Chicken was observed held at 62-63 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per staff interview, unit had become unplugged and staff had just plugged unit in. Based on interview and temperature observations, food was not in danger zone for more than an hour, food did not need to be disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Sliced deli meat and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, meatballs were placed hot in the walk-in in containers (bowls, pot) greater than four inches deep. Staff spread out on pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Working containers of various sauces were not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear prep/storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Cases of cheese and box of calzones were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -food scale -can opener and base -stand mixer and bowl -under prep unit lids. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Several ceiling tiles in the dry storage area are missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated work is in progress to replace ceiling tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Pasta and deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
Handwash sink was in poor repair, observed missing caulking. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The ceiling throughout the facility has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
